comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Mobile streaming fallback (1.8.0): useStreaming() + setupPlayer dispatcher → desktop = gapless Web Audio buffer engine, mobile/low-mem = setupStreamingPlayer (streamed <audio>, near-zero RAM); grid+snapping in both, streamed seek is quantized w/ small gap. preloadAudio skips on streaming. ?stream/?buffer override. Both paths verified rendering; live mobile playback still to be listen-tested. (cover/audio are placeholders per user; buy/donate URLs still open.)
